Class XmlUtil.ObjectNotationTransformerHandler

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.xml.XmlUtil.ObjectNotationTransformerHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
TransformerHandler, XmlRowWriter.ObjectFormatTransformer, ContentHandler, DTDHandler, LexicalHandler
Enclosing class:
XmlUtil
public static class XmlUtil.ObjectNotationTransformerHandler extends Object implements TransformerHandler, XmlRowWriter.ObjectFormatTransformer
Author:
Ralf Wisser
